scripts.docker:check: docker images | grep updown-dev || npm run docker:build
scripts.docker:run: docker ps | grep updown-dev-container || docker run -d --name updown-dev-container -v $(pwd):/workspace -p 3000:3000 updown-dev tail -f /dev/null
scripts.docker:status: docker ps | grep updown-dev-container || echo 'Dev container is not running.'
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop updown-dev-container || true && docker rm updown-dev-container || true
scripts.start: npm run docker:check && npm run docker:run && npm run docker:status
